result:
All 30 tests pass. Here's what was added to `Main.scala`:

- **`status`** — prints `Staged files:` header followed by staged filenames or `(none)`
- **`diff <c1> <c2>`** — compares file→blob maps of two commits, reports Added/Removed/Modified
- **`checkout <hash>`** — restores blobs to working directory, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset <hash>`** — moves HEAD only (no working directory changes), clears index
- **`rm <file>`** — removes a filename from the index, errors if not present
- **`show <hash>`** — prints commit metadata and files with two-space indent

A shared `parseCommit()` helper reads commit files and returns a `CommitData` case class used by diff, checkout, reset, and show.
